name: 58" Solid Rustic Reclaimed Wood Entry Bench Honey - Saracina Home: Bottom Shelf, Seating for Hallway
description: Include this beautiful bench in your hallway or entryway for some additional storage, seating, and style. Simple in structure, this bench will add a wonderful, rustic feel to a room from the distressed, reclaimed look made of solid pine. Featuring a bottom shelf for organizing your shoes or other items you'll need in the morning, in order to get out of the house on time.Additional Dimensions:Overall Width: 58 inchesOverall Height: 18 inchesOverall Depth: 15 inchesShoe Shelf Width: 55.50 inchesShoe Shelf Height: 10.5 inchesShoe Shelf Depth: 11.75 inches
